fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date for a time sheet.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date for a time sheet.

fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource for the time sheet.

fields.name: Resource Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the resource for the time sheet.

fields.name: Owner User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the owner ID of the time sheet. The owner of a time sheet has permission to enter time usage on a time sheet. The owner can also submit a time sheet for approval.

fields.name: Approver User ID
fields.tooltip: Contains the ID of a user with permission to approve time sheets.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the time sheet.

fields.name: Open Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies if there are time sheet lines with the status Open.

fields.name: Submitted Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies if there are time sheet lines with the status Submitted.

fields.name: Rejected Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether there are time sheet lines with the status Rejected.

fields.name: Approved Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether there are time sheet lines with the status Approved.

fields.name: Posted Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether there are time sheet lines with the status Posted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total number of hours that are registered on the time sheet.

fields.name: Posted Quantity
fields.tooltip: Displays the posted number of hours that have been entered on a time sheet. The number is the sum of all hours entered and posted on all time sheet lines and includes all status types.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment about this document has been entered.

fields.name: Status Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the filter that allows you to see an overview of the time sheets with a certain value in the Status field.
The available status options are Open, Submitted, Rejected, or Approved.

fields.name: Job No. Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for time sheets that filters by job number.

fields.name: Job Task No. Filter
fields.tooltip: Displays the filter that filters by job task number for a time sheet.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Posted Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the filter that is used whether a time sheet has been posted.

fields.name: Type Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the types that you can filter time sheets by.

fields.name: Quantity Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours for the time sheet with status Open.

fields.name: Quantity Submitted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours for the time sheet with status Submitted.

fields.name: Quantity Approved
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours for the time sheet with status Approved.

fields.name: Quantity Rejected
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours for the time sheet with status Rejected.
